title: DAP SDK Async Testing Framework
description: Comprehensive async testing utilities for DAP SDK - timeout handling, condition polling, thread safety

overview.purpose: Universal async testing infrastructure for DAP SDK and dependent projects
key_features: Global test timeout (alarm-based) to prevent infinite hangs
Condition polling with configurable timeout and poll interval
pthread condition variable helpers for async operations
Convenience macros for quick async tests
overview.compliance: DAP SDK coding standards, all comments in English

components.name: Global Test Timeout
components.description: Uses SIGALRM + siglongjmp to limit entire test suite execution time

components.name: Condition Polling
components.description: Periodically calls condition callback until met or timeout

components.name: Time Utilities
components.description: Cross-platform monotonic time and sleep functions

components.name: Convenience Macros
components.description: Quick async condition waiting without explicit callbacks

global_timeout.description: Alarm-based timeout for entire test suite
global_timeout.typical_usage: int main() { dap_test_global_timeout_t t; if (dap_test_set_global_timeout(&t, 30, "My Tests")) return 1; ... dap_test_cancel_global_timeout(); }

functions.name: dap_test_set_global_timeout
functions.returns: 0 on first call, 1 if timeout triggered (after longjmp)

functions.name: dap_test_cancel_global_timeout
functions.description: Cancel alarm and restore default signal handler

condition_polling.description: Wait for condition with periodic polling
condition_polling.typical_usage: bool check(void *d) { return state == READY; } dap_test_async_config_t cfg = DAP_TEST_ASYNC_CONFIG_DEFAULT; cfg.timeout_ms = 10000; bool ok = dap_test_wait_condition(check, data, &cfg);

functions.name: dap_test_wait_condition
functions.returns: true if condition met, false on timeout

configuration.poll_interval_ms: Polling interval (0 = no polling, use 100ms default)
configuration.fail_on_timeout: true = abort() on timeout, false = return false

pthread_helpers.typical_usage: dap_test_cond_wait_ctx_t ctx; dap_test_cond_wait_init(&ctx); start_async(&ctx); bool ok = dap_test_cond_wait(&ctx, 5000); dap_test_cond_wait_deinit(&ctx);

functions.name: dap_test_cond_wait
functions.returns: true if signaled, false on timeout

global_timeout_example.title: Global Test Suite Timeout
global_timeout_example.explanation: Prevents test suite from hanging indefinitely

condition_polling_example.title: Wait for State Machine Transition
condition_polling_example.explanation: Polls state until condition met or timeout

pthread_helper_example.title: Async Callback Synchronization
pthread_helper_example.explanation: Thread-safe waiting for async operation completion

macro_example.title: Quick Inline Condition Wait
macro_example.explanation: Simplest way to wait for conditions without callbacks

limitations: alarm() not available - use condition polling instead

best_practices: Always use global timeout for test suites to prevent CI hangs
Choose poll intervals based on operation latency (100ms default works for most cases)
Use descriptive operation names for better debugging logs
Clean up resources (deinit contexts) even on timeout
Don't mix alarm-based and timer-based timeouts in same test
Use dap_test_wait_condition for complex scenarios with custom config
Use pthread helpers for async callbacks that need signaling

state_machine_testing.description: Test async state transitions with timeout
state_machine_testing.example:
bool check_state(void *sm) { return vpn_sm_get_state(sm) == TARGET; }
dap_test_wait_condition(check_state, sm, &cfg);

network_operation_testing.description: Test network operations with realistic timeouts

timeout_too_short.symptom: Tests failing with timeout even when operation is valid
timeout_too_short.solution: Increase timeout_ms in config or global timeout seconds

test_hangs_despite_timeout.solution: Ensure dap_common_init() called before timeout setup, check signal handlers

race_conditions.solution: Use pthread helpers instead of polling for thread synchronization

future_enhancements: HTML test reports with timing graphs

code_quality: ✅ DAP SDK naming conventions (dap_, l_, a_)
